description.overview: English Springer Spaniels are friendly, athletic dogs bred to 'spring' game for hunters. They're excellent family companions and versatile sporting dogs.
description.temperament: Springers are friendly, eager to please, and playful. They love people and are great with children. Active and need engagement.
description.health: Generally healthy but prone to hip dysplasia, eye problems, and ear infections. Clean ears regularly.
description.exercise: High exercise needs. Daily vigorous activity, swimming, and field work.

verdict.summary: Friendly, athletic family dogs that love children and activities. Springers need regular exercise and engagement. Great for active families who want a loving, playful companion.
